description: Reference event extract may be unavailable
mitigation: Confirm synthetic fallback before data-contract work
trigger: data_access gate fails or evidence is missing

description: User-level fields may enter a public sample
mitigation: Publish only aggregated or synthetic rows
trigger: privacy gate fails or evidence is missing

description: Descriptive evidence may be written as causal
mitigation: Block causal wording in claim review
trigger: methodology gate fails or evidence is missing

description: Implementation may exceed a laptop budget
mitigation: Keep a deterministic tiny profile and bounded sample
trigger: compute gate fails or evidence is missing

description: Consumer artifact may be stale or hard to rerun
mitigation: Require freshness marker and one-command build
trigger: delivery gate fails or evidence is missing

description: Independent review may arrive after the defense date
trigger: review gate fails or evidence is missing
